critic_notes: IND.2.1 Allgemeine ICS-Komponenten: 3 questions on ICS hardening (default passwords, ICS/Office-IT separation, disable unused services). Quotes found in source near manifest range (buffer zone — manifest drift). Correct answers unambiguously supported; distractors (leave defaults, merge ICS with Office-IT, enable all interfaces) clearly wrong. Topic `bausteine` fits. Schema uses chapter-level baustein_id — acceptable.

issues.detail: Fragment `Standardmäßig eingerichtete bzw. vom herstellenden Unternehmen gesetzte Passwörter MÜSSEN ...` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.
Fragment `ICS-Komponenten MÜSSEN von der Office-IT getrennt werden....` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.

Fragment `ICS-Komponenten SOLLTEN so wenig wie möglich mit anderen ICS-Komponenten kommunizieren....` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.

Fragment `Alle nicht genutzten Dienste, Funktionen und Schnittstellen der ICS-Komponenten MÜSSEN dea...` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.
